description.value:
Requirements Your mouth is exposed

Effect You breathe a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] of acid, dealing @Damage[1d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage for every 2 levels to all creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use Volosian Spit again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Volosian Spit]]{1d4 rounds}.
